title: proxy Option<String> should be part of a ConnectConfig struct
description: The proxy parameter (Option<String>) is threaded through four function signatures: connect(), connect_with_retry(), connection_manager(), and open_authenticated_ws(). In connection_manager it is cloned on every reconnect attempt. This design accumulates cost as new per-connection options are added (timeout, keep-alive interval, proxy authentication, etc.) — each new option requires updating all four signatures. A ConnectConfig struct holding url, accept_invalid_certs, and proxy would reduce churn, make the API more stable, and eliminate the per-reconnect clone of the full string. This is a design concern, not a correctness bug.
close_reason: ConnectConfig struct refactor is a future extensibility improvement, not a correctness issue. Deferred.
